patterns.name: Inverse Head & Shoulders

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 50% BELOW the consolidated figure — subsidiaries/associates are contributing earnings the parent-only accounts don't show; the group is worth more than the standalone.
